jsonLd.title: Shyaway is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway:
Shyaway is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
